   578	def run_semantic_extensions(
   579	    clip_path: Path,
   580	    frame_metrics_df: pd.DataFrame,
   581	    summary: dict[str, Any],
   582	    run_dir: Path,
   583	    config: SemanticConfig,
   584	    events_path: Path,
   585	) -> dict[str, Any]:
   586	    artifacts = build_semantic_artifacts(run_dir)
   587	    samples = _save_sampled_frames(
   588	        clip_path=clip_path,
   589	        frame_metrics_df=frame_metrics_df,
   590	        artifacts=artifacts,
   591	        config=config,
   592	        events_path=events_path,
   593	        clip_duration_sec=float(summary["clip"]["duration_sec_actual"]),
   594	    )
   595	    qwen_result = _run_qwen(samples, config, events_path)
   596	    payload = _build_summary(samples, summary, qwen_result)
   597	
   598	    artifacts.qwen_annotations_path.write_text(
   599	        json.dumps(qwen_result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=True),
   600	        encoding="utf-8",
   601	    )
   602	    artifacts.summary_json_path.write_text(
   603	        json.dumps(payload, indent=2, ensure_ascii=True),
   604	        encoding="utf-8",
   605	    )
   606	    artifacts.summary_md_path.write_text(
   607	        _summary_markdown(payload, summary, qwen_result),
   608	        encoding="utf-8",
   609	    )
   610	    _build_contact_sheet(samples, qwen_result, artifacts.contact_sheet_path)
   611	    log_event(
   612	        events_path,
   613	        "semantic_extensions_finished",
   614	        qwen_status=qwen_result["status"],
   615	        summary_json=str(artifacts.summary_json_path),
   616	        contact_sheet=str(artifacts.contact_sheet_path),
   617	    )
   618	    return {
   619	        "artifacts": {
   620	            "root_dir": str(artifacts.root_dir),
   621	            "sampled_frames_dir": str(artifacts.sampled_frames_dir),
   622	            "contact_sheet": str(artifacts.contact_sheet_path),
   623	            "qwen_annotations": str(artifacts.qwen_annotations_path),
   624	            "summary_json": str(artifacts.summary_json_path),
   625	            "summary_md": str(artifacts.summary_md_path),
   626	        },
   627	        "summary": payload,
   628	        "qwen": qwen_result,
   629	    }

payload.message:
Changed only the requested files.

In [semantic.py](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/semantic.py#L22), I removed the dead local-backend config fields from `SemanticConfig` and `SemanticArtifacts`, dropped the JSON `ast.literal_eval` fallback in [_extract_json_blob](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/semantic.py#L95), and made [_run_qwen](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/semantic.py#L315) Gemini-only. I also removed the entire SAM2 path and its summary/contact-sheet wiring, so [run_semantic_extensions](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/semantic.py#L578) now emits only Gemini semantic outputs and agreement data. The unused local-backend imports were removed as part of that cleanup.

In [coaching.py](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/coaching.py#L26), I removed `coach_device`, `qwen_device`, `qwen_device_map`, and `qwen_dtype` from `CoachingConfig`, removed the `is_gemini_model` gate, and made [_run_coach_llm](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/coaching.py#L1698) always use Gemini with the existing schema-validation and deterministic fallback merge still intact. In [run_coaching_report](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/coaching.py#L2062), the targeted semantic review windows now build a minimal `SemanticConfig` with only Gemini-supported fields. I preserved the unrelated pre-existing edits already present in this file.

In [app_service.py](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/app_service.py#L239), I removed the obsolete service args for `qwen_device`, `qwen_device_map`, `qwen_dtype`, `disable_sam2`, `sam2_model_cfg`, `sam2_checkpoint`, `sam2_device`, and `coach_device`, and updated the semantic/coaching config construction and event logging accordingly. In [run_long_experiment.py](/workspace/TeacherEvaluation/run_long_experiment.py#L9), I removed the matching CLI flags and call-site args, and also removed the CLI print of SAM2 semantic status.

Compatibility notes:
- `run_teacher_evaluation(...)` no longer accepts the removed device/SAM2 args.
- `run_long_experiment.py` no longer accepts `--qwen-device`, `--qwen-device-map`, `--qwen-dtype`, `--disable-sam2`, `--sam2-model-cfg`, `--sam2-checkpoint`, `--sam2-device`, or `--coach-device`.
- `semantic_payload["summary"]` no longer contains a `sam2` section.
- `semantic_payload["artifacts"]` no longer contains `sam2_metrics`.
- `semantic_payload` no longer returns a top-level `sam2` object.

Verification: `python -m py_compile /workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/semantic.py /workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/coaching.py /workspace/TeacherEvaluation/nonverbal_eval/app_service.py /workspace/TeacherEvaluation/run_long_experiment.py` passed.
